experiments.title: A/B Experiments
experiments.subtitle: Compares two versions of a template with deterministic bucketing by {{code}}. One active experiment per scope (DB rule).
experiments.emptyDescription: Experiments require at least two versions of a template. Create a template and edit it to generate versions before creating an experiment.

endDialog.title: End experiment
endDialog.message: Stops bucketing and frees the scope for a new experiment. Idempotent operation. Data is preserved in history.

deleteDialog.title: Delete experiment
deleteDialog.message: Removes the experiment record. Rows in llm_token_usage with this ExperimentId become orphaned (no cascade by design — preserves historical analytics).

results.title: Results by variant
results.empty: No LLM call recorded under this experiment yet.
